title: Multi-Era Album Covers
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for fictional album-cover sets that reinterpret one musical concept through multiple visual eras, from 1960s folk to 2020s hyperpop.

en.title: Multi-Era Album Covers
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for fictional album-cover sets that reinterpret one musical concept through multiple visual eras, from 1960s folk to 2020s hyperpop.

zh-CN.title: 多时代 Album Cover 专辑封面合集
zh-CN.description: 测试同一音乐概念在 1960s 民谣、1970s 摇滚、1980s synthwave、1990s grunge、2000s emo、2020s hyperpop 等时代视觉中的重新演绎。
